Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Magister]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 10''' — A Magister is a level of skill higher than what Calder currently possesses.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Magister is a level or role above Gardener.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — A Magister's greatest weapon is his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The assassin killed one Magister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Magisters carry staves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — A robed Magister sits in the Imperial box.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — A Magister could pick up the Sleepless cell in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Magisters created sealing boxes in conjunction with the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Magister uses a staff decorated with blue crystals.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — A team of Magisters and Imperial Guards awaited Shera on the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Reader searching for Loreli might be a Magister.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
